dates.summary: ByteDance officially launched Seed 2.0 and previewed Dola-Seed-2.0 on Arena, marking a notable new frontier-model push from one of China’s largest consumer internet platforms. OpenAI also launched its Safety Fellowship to fund independent alignment talent development, while a new robotics system, GEN-1, reported 99% task reliability on manipulation work such as box folding and vacuum repair. Separately, Zero Shot, a fund tied to OpenAI alumni, is reportedly targeting $100 million, signaling continued capital formation around the OpenAI ecosystem.
